payload.label: rug
payload.long_description: Low-pile, solid dark navy/charcoal rectangular floor rug occupying most of the crop; straight edges visible but top/right are partially cropped by the image border, lying flat on a wooden floor about 1.2 m from the camera.

message.content: {"label":"rug","short_description":"dark rectangular floor rug, edge-cropped","long_description":"Low-pile, solid dark navy/charcoal rectangular floor rug occupying most of the crop; straight edges visible but top/right are partially cropped by the image border, lying flat on a wooden floor about 1.2 m from the camera.","attributes":["dark navy/charcoal color","rectangular shape","low-pile / flatwoven texture","solid color","straight edges","partially cropped (top/right)","lies on wooden floor","large relative size in crop"],"distance_from_camera_m":1.2}
